contactPage.title: Contact us
contactPage.subtitle: Have questions, suggestions or want to collaborate? Get in touch!
contactPage.writeDescription: For all questions, review suggestions, business opportunities or any other communication, feel free to contact us via email. Our team will respond as soon as possible.
contactPage.aboutPametnoDesc: Pametno Odabrano is your trusted guide through the world of technology. Our team of experts tests and reviews the latest tech products to help you make informed decisions.
contactPage.followUsDesc: Stay up to date with the latest reviews and tech news.

aboutPage.title: About us
aboutPage.subtitle: Meet the team behind Pametno Odabrano - your trusted platform for reviews and recommendations of technology products
aboutPage.missionP1: Pametno Odabrano was born from a simple idea: to help people make better decisions when purchasing technology products.
aboutPage.missionP2: In a sea of information and endless options, our goal is to provide clear, objective and thorough reviews that save you time and money.
aboutPage.missionP3: We believe everyone deserves access to quality information that helps them find the technology that best suits their needs.
aboutPage.objectivityDesc: Our reviews are independent and objective. We don't allow sponsorships to influence our ratings.
aboutPage.thoroughnessDesc: We test every product in detail before publishing a review. Quality over quantity.
aboutPage.communityDesc: We're building a community of tech enthusiasts who share experiences and help each other.
aboutPage.innovationDesc: We follow the latest trends and continuously improve our platform to provide you with the best experience.
aboutPage.aboutSarayaP1: Pametno Odabrano is a project developed by Saraya Solutions, a technology company headquartered in Sarajevo, Bosnia and Herzegovina.
aboutPage.aboutSarayaP2: Saraya Solutions specializes in developing modern web applications and digital platforms. Our team consists of experienced developers, designers, and digital marketing experts working together to create innovative solutions.
aboutPage.aboutSarayaP3: Through Pametno Odabrano, we want to contribute to the local tech community by providing quality content about the latest technology products and trends.
aboutPage.questionsDesc: We're always open to feedback and suggestions for new reviews. Get in touch!

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.subtitle: Protecting your privacy is important to us
privacyPage.s1P1: This Privacy Policy explains how Pametno Odabrano collects, uses, and protects personal data of users of the Pametno Odabrano platform (website and related services). By using our platform, you accept the rules described in this Policy.
privacyPage.s1P2: Pametno Odabrano is developed and maintained by Saraya Solutions from Sarajevo (hereinafter: “we”, “us”, “our platform”). We strive to process your data transparently, securely, and only for purposes that are clearly explained to you.
privacyPage.s2aDesc: When you contact us through the contact form, email, or other channels, we may collect:
s2aItems: content of your message and any additional information
privacyPage.s2bDesc: When you use Pametno Odabrano, we may collect technical and analytical data, such as:
s2bItems: IP address (shortened or anonymized where possible)
pages you visit and time spent on them
privacyPage.s2bFooter: We use this data primarily for statistics, system security, and improving user experience.
privacyPage.s3Desc: We use your data exclusively for purposes related to the operation and development of the Pametno Odabrano platform, including:
s3Items: responding to your inquiries and requests
displaying reviews and recommendations of technology products
analyzing platform usage and optimizing content
privacyPage.s3Footer: We do not sell your personal data to third parties. We may share data only with trusted partners or service providers who help us operate the platform (hosting, analytics, etc.), with appropriate data processing agreements.
privacyPage.s4Desc: We process personal data based on:
s4Items: your consent – e.g. when you contact us through the contact form
legitimate interest for platform operation – e.g. basic analytics, system security
legal obligations – if applicable laws require retention of certain information
privacyPage.s5Desc: You have the right to request:
privacyPage.s5Footer: To exercise these rights, contact us at:
privacyPage.s6Desc: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or the processing of your data, you can contact us at:

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.subtitle: Rules for using the Pametno Odabrano platform
termsPage.s1P1: Welcome to the Pametno Odabrano platform. By using our website and related services (hereinafter: “platform”), you accept these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with these terms, please do not use the platform.
termsPage.s1P2: Pametno Odabrano is developed and maintained by Saraya Solutions from Sarajevo. These terms apply to all users of the platform.
termsPage.s2Desc: Pametno Odabrano is a digital platform that provides reviews, recommendations and articles about technology products. The platform organizes content through:
s2Items: Articles – detailed reviews and recommendations of technology products
Categories – product organization by type (audio, smart home, wearables, etc.)
termsPage.s2Footer: The platform’s goal is to offer users quality information and recommendations that help them make informed decisions when purchasing technology products.
termsPage.s3Desc: As a user of the platform, you agree to use it in accordance with applicable laws, good practices and these Terms of Service. This means you will not:
s3Items: misuse the platform for illegal purposes
attempt to technically compromise system security
send spam, unwanted messages or unauthorized commercial offers
publish or send content that is offensive, illegal or violates third-party rights
termsPage.s4P1: Product information we display is collected from multiple sources:
s4Items: publicly available data and official manufacturer information
termsPage.s4P2: We strive to ensure information is accurate and up-to-date, but we cannot guarantee that all information is completely accurate at all times (e.g., price changes, specifications, availability, etc.).
termsPage.s4P3: Pametno Odabrano is not a seller of products displayed on the platform. For purchases, warranties and services related to products, the seller or manufacturer is always responsible.
termsPage.s5P1: All content on the Pametno Odabrano platform, including texts, graphics, logos, icons, images and software, is protected by copyright and other intellectual property laws.
termsPage.s5P2: Copying, distribution or modification of content without prior written permission from Saraya Solutions is not permitted.
termsPage.s6P1: The Pametno Odabrano platform is provided “as is”. We do not guarantee that the platform will always be available, error-free, or that it will meet all your needs.
termsPage.s6P2: Saraya Solutions will not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the platform.
termsPage.s7Desc: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Changes take effect upon publication on this page. We recommend checking this page periodically.
termsPage.s8Desc: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, contact us at:

cookiesPage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPage.subtitle: How we use cookies on the Pametno Odabrano platform
cookiesPage.s1P1: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, mobile phone) when you visit a website. They are used to remember your settings, analyze traffic and improve user experience.
cookiesPage.s1P2: On the Pametno Odabrano platform, we use cookies to provide you with the best possible experience when browsing our articles and recommendations.
cookiesPage.essentialDesc: These cookies are necessary for the basic functioning of the platform. They enable navigation and access to secure areas of the site. Without these cookies, the platform could not function properly.
cookiesPage.analyticsDesc: We use analytics cookies (e.g., Google Analytics) to understand how visitors use our platform. This data helps us improve content and user experience. The information we collect is anonymous and aggregated.
cookiesPage.functionalDesc: These cookies remember your settings and preferences (e.g., language, region, theme) to provide you with a personalized experience when visiting the platform.
cookiesPage.thirdPartyDesc: Some parts of our platform may use third-party cookies (e.g., for embedded video content, social networks or external links). These cookies are controlled by third parties and are subject to their privacy policies.
cookiesPage.s3Desc: Most web browsers automatically accept cookies, but you can change your browser settings to control or block cookies. Here’s how to do it in the most popular browsers:
cookiesPage.browserChrome: Google Chrome: Settings → Privacy and security → Cookies and other site data
cookiesPage.browserFirefox: Mozilla Firefox: Settings → Privacy & Security → Cookies and site data
cookiesPage.browserSafari: Safari: Settings → Privacy → Manage website data
cookiesPage.browserEdge: Microsoft Edge: Settings → Cookies and site permissions
cookiesPage.s3Footer: Note: Blocking all cookies may affect the functionality of some parts of the platform.
cookiesPage.s4Title: 4. How long do we keep cookies?
cookiesPage.s4Desc: The duration of cookies depends on their type:
cookiesPage.sessionCookies: Session cookies: They are automatically deleted when you close your browser.
cookiesPage.persistentCookies: Persistent cookies: They remain on your device for a certain period of time or until you delete them manually. They typically last from a few days to 2 years, depending on the purpose.
cookiesPage.s5Desc: We reserve the right to modify this Cookie Policy at any time. All changes will be published on this page. You can see the date of the last modification at the bottom of this page.
cookiesPage.s6Desc: If you have questions about this Cookie Policy, contact us at:
